query:
ALTER TABLE migration_jobs
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS contactsImported INT DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS companiesImported INT DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS dealsImported INT DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS activitiesImported INT DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS customFieldsCreated INT DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS duplicatesMerged INT DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS isIncrementalSync BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS sinceDate BIGINT,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS lastSyncedAt BIGINT,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS updatedAt BIGINT;

  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS contactsImported INT DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS companiesImported INT DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS dealsImported INT DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS activitiesImported INT DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS customFieldsCreated INT DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS duplicatesMerged INT DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS isIncrementalSync BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS sinceDate BIGINT,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS lastSyncedAt BIGINT,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS updatedAt BIGINT;
